label: No paid API mode

sources.note: Enough for recommendation validation, not full market coverage.
Atom schema is stable enough for taste tests.
Seed games use attributed RAWG cover candidates where available; generated posters remain the fallback for unresolved imports.
101 candidates are queued by lane, readiness, cover gap, and price need before promotion into the seed catalog.
P0 uses representative sample data until ingestion is built.
P0 stores narrow history only for hot-intent games; do not treat it as full-market price history.
Subscription claims are prototype-only in this dataset.
P0 tracks two monthly PS Plus checkpoints, but exact dates need ingestion.

rules: Do not buy pricing APIs before validating recommendation/action value.
Keep P0 to a small region set and a controlled catalog.
Show source freshness before trusting price or subscription claims.
Suppress claims if future live ingestion marks a source stale.
Refresh hot user intent before refreshing the broad catalog.
